tool_spec.name: interpret_instruction
tool_spec.description: Interpret a natural-language user request into a structured load-change instruction.

instruction.result_request_rationale: User requested a load change (2 MW increase) without specifying any result metric. Action magnitude (2 MW) is part of the instruction, not a requested result.
